'''zowapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atavic|atavic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atavic|atavic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zowapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowapithi|zowapithi]] || [[word:zowapiji|zowapiji]] || [[word:zowapishi|zowapishi]] || [[word:zowapiki|zowapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowaputhuthu|zowaputhuthu]] || [[word:zowapujuju|zowapujuju]] || [[word:zowapushushu|zowapushushu]] || [[word:zowapukuku|zowapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowaputhu|zowaputhu]] || [[word:zowapuju|zowapuju]] || [[word:zowapushu|zowapushu]] || [[word:zowapuku|zowapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowapufthuf|zowapufthuf]] || [[word:zowapufjuf|zowapufjuf]] || [[word:zowapufshuf|zowapufshuf]] || [[word:zowapufkuf|zowapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowapethe|zowapethe]] || [[word:zowapeje|zowapeje]] || [[word:zowapeshe|zowapeshe]] || [[word:zowapeke|zowapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowapothotho|zowapothotho]] || [[word:zowapojojo|zowapojojo]] || [[word:zowaposhosho|zowaposhosho]] || [[word:zowapokoko|zowapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowapotho|zowapotho]] || [[word:zowapojo|zowapojo]] || [[word:zowaposho|zowaposho]] || [[word:zowapoko|zowapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowapofthof|zowapofthof]] || [[word:zowapofjof|zowapofjof]] || [[word:zowapofshof|zowapofshof]] || [[word:zowapofkof|zowapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfthÃŸf|zowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfjÃŸf|zowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfshÃŸf|zowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfkÃŸf|zowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfthÃŸf|zowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfjÃŸf|zowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfshÃŸf|zowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfkÃŸf|zowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfthÃŸf|zowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfjÃŸf|zowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfshÃŸf|zowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zowapÃŸfkÃŸf|zowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowapÃḊthÃḊ|zowapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zowapÃḊjÃḊ|zowapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zowapÃḊshÃḊ|zowapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zowapÃḊkÃḊ|zowapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowapathatha|zowapathatha]] || [[word:zowapajaja|zowapajaja]] || [[word:zowapashasha|zowapashasha]] || [[word:zowapakaka|zowapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowapatha|zowapatha]] || [[word:zowapaja|zowapaja]] || [[word:zowapasha|zowapasha]] || [[word:zowapaka|zowapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowapafthaf|zowapafthaf]] || [[word:zowapafjaf|zowapafjaf]] || [[word:zowapafshaf|zowapafshaf]] || [[word:zowapafkaf|zowapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zowapasha|zowapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zowapshÃḋsha|zowapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zowaprosha|zowaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zowapmusha|zowapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zowapyasha|zowapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozowapnkshÃḋsha|gozowapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozowapnkrosha|gozowapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozowapnkmusha|gozowapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozowapnkyasha|gozowapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zowawapasha|zowawapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zowawapshÃḋsha|zowawapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zowawaprosha|zowawaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zowawapmusha|zowawapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zowawapyasha|zowawapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozowawapnkshÃḋsha|gozowawapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozowawapnkrosha|gozowawapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozowawapnkmusha|gozowawapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozowawapnkyasha|gozowawapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zewÃḊpasha|zewÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zewÃḊpshÃḋsha|zewÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zewÃḊprosha|zewÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zewÃḊpmusha|zewÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zewÃḊpyasha|zewÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gozewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozewÃḊpnkrosha|gozewÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozewÃḊpnkmusha|gozewÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozewÃḊpnkyasha|gozewÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zowfapasha|zowfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zowfapshÃḋsha|zowfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zowfaprosha|zowfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zowfapmusha|zowfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zowfapyasha|zowfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozowfapnkshÃḋsha|gozowfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozowfapnkrosha|gozowfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozowfapnkmusha|gozowfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozowfapnkyasha|gozowfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
